task_completion.description: Create the minecraft_mode directory in the Talon user folder
task_completion.visual_evidence: File explorer, terminal, or editor tree showing the directory 'minecraft_mode' exists within 'C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\'.

task_completion.description: Create minecraft.py with mode definition and mc_stop_all action
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor showing 'minecraft.py' containing Python code that defines a 'minecraft' mode (e.g., using Module().mode) and an action named 'mc_stop_all' that releases the 'w', 'a', 's', 'd', 'shift', and 'space' keys.

task_completion.description: Create minecraft_global.talon with mode toggle commands
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor showing 'minecraft_global.talon' containing Talon commands 'minecraft mode enable' and 'minecraft mode disable' that toggle between the custom minecraft mode and standard command mode.

task_completion.description: Create minecraft_keys.talon with game controls restricted to minecraft mode
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor showing 'minecraft_keys.talon' with a mode restriction header (e.g., 'mode: user.minecraft') and voice commands mapped to actions: 'walk forward', 'walk back', 'strafe left', 'strafe right', 'sprint', 'inventory', 'mine block' (left click), and 'stop' (calling mc_stop_all).

integrity.description: The configuration files were actually saved to disk
integrity.visual_evidence: The text editor tabs do not show 'unsaved' indicators (like a dot or asterisk) for the final files, or terminal commands confirm the files were written.

integrity.description: Files are saved in the exact requested directory
integrity.visual_evidence: The file paths visible in the editor title bar, tooltip, or terminal explicitly show 'C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\minecraft_mode'.

integrity.description: The agent generated the code rather than downloading a pre-made solution
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen typing or constructing the code in an editor or terminal, rather than just downloading or extracting a pre-existing archive.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target directory: C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\minecraft_mode. Expected files: minecraft.py, minecraft_global.talon, minecraft_keys.talon. The task requires creating a Talon configuration for Minecraft with specific voice commands and a custom action to stop movement.
